mapper.select:
SELECT t.* FROM eb_attendance_arrange t LEFT JOIN eb_attendance_group g ON g.id = t.group_id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL
AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
AND g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.nameLike}, '%')
AND DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') = #{query.attendMonth}
ORDER BY t.id DESC

SELECT t.* FROM eb_attendance_arrange t LEFT JOIN eb_attendance_group g ON g.id = t.group_id AND g.deleted_at IS NULL
AND t.deleted_at IS NULL
AND g.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.nameLike}, '%')
AND DATE_FORMAT(t.date, '%Y-%m') = #{query.attendMonth}
ORDER BY t.id DESC
